summary: All 25 acceptance criteria passed. 4 skill directories created with valid SKILL.md files (all <500 lines, correct frontmatter, correct skill types). All 12 reference/asset files exist and are non-empty. All reference links in SKILL.md files resolve to existing files. CSP with script-src 'none' present in preview-template.html. File name validation pattern described in both file-creating skills. do-task hook correctly placed between commit and reviewers. like-figma directory deleted with no stale references.

criteria.description: 4 skill directories created: design-system-init, design-generate, design-review, design-retrospective
criteria.notes: All 4 directories exist under skills/ with SKILL.md files.

criteria.description: Each SKILL.md has frontmatter with name + description
criteria.notes: design-system-init: name + description with trigger phrases. design-generate: name + description with trigger phrases. design-review: name + description with trigger phrases. design-retrospective: name + description with trigger phrases.

criteria.description: Each SKILL.md is under 500 lines
criteria.notes: design-system-init: 171 lines. design-generate: 149 lines. design-review: 111 lines. design-retrospective: 167 lines.

criteria.description: Skill types correct (procedural: phases+checkpoints; informational: sections+decision framework)
criteria.notes: design-system-init: procedural, 5 phases (0-4) with checkpoints after each. design-generate: procedural, 5 phases (0-4) with checkpoints. design-review: informational, sections by logic with decision framework table. design-retrospective: procedural, 5 phases (1-5) with checkpoints.

criteria.description: shared/design-references/ contains design-tokens.md, color-psychology.md, color-principles.md, library-catalog.md
criteria.notes: All 4 files exist: design-tokens.md (3422B), color-psychology.md (18396B), color-principles.md (13416B), library-catalog.md (5880B).

criteria.description: design-system-init/references/font-pairing.md created with concrete font pair recommendations
criteria.notes: File exists (7786B), contains 10 font combinations with heading/body pairs, pairing type, mood, weights.

criteria.description: design-generate/references/ contains component-patterns.md, generation-guide.md, grid-techniques.md
criteria.notes: All 3 files exist: component-patterns.md (4260B), generation-guide.md (9616B), grid-techniques.md (10666B).

criteria.description: preview-template.html exists with CSP meta tag (script-src 'none')
criteria.notes: File at design-generate/assets/preview-template.html line 6: <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="script-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com">. script-src 'none' blocks all JS execution.

criteria.description: do-task SKILL.md updated with design-review integration between Step 2.3 and 2.5
criteria.notes: do-task SKILL.md Step 2, item 4 (line 49): design-review hook checks both conditions (tokens.json exists AND UI files changed), spawns design-review subagent, skips silently if conditions fail. Placed after item 3 (git commit) and before item 5 (reviewers). Explicit guard: 'This hook calls ONLY design-review, not the full design pipeline.'

criteria.description: All reference links in SKILL.md files resolve to existing files
criteria.notes: Verified 11 reference links across 3 skills: design-system-init (4 links), design-generate (5 links including preview-template.html), design-review (2 links). All resolve. design-retrospective has 0 reference links (by design — it operates on project runtime files).

criteria.description: like-figma skill directory deleted
criteria.notes: skills/like-figma/ does not exist. Confirmed via test -d.

criteria.description: No stale references to skills/like-figma/ in skills/ or shared/
criteria.notes: grep for 'like-figma' in skills/ and shared/ returned 0 matches.

criteria.description: File name validation /^[a-z0-9-]+$/ described in design-system-init and design-generate
criteria.notes: design-system-init: Phase 3.1 line 117 and Phase 4 step 4 line 156. design-generate: Phase 3.4 line 97. Both explain the pattern prevents path traversal.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: /design-system-init creates tokens.json with colors, fonts (Google Fonts), spacing
criteria.notes: SKILL.md Phase 3 covers: tokens.json generation per design-tokens.md schema (colors primary/secondary/neutral/semantic/background/text, typography families/sizes/weights/lineHeights, spacing). Phase 2.3 selects Google Fonts pairs via font-pairing.md. Phase 3.3 loads Google Fonts via <link> tag.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: /design-system-init creates minimum 3 components (button, card, input) as HTML files
criteria.notes: SKILL.md Phase 2.6 proposes components including 'button, card, input, badge, alert, navbar'. Phase 3.3 generates .design-system/components/{name}.html for each approved component.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Each component opens in browser autonomously (valid HTML, CSS custom properties resolve)
criteria.notes: SKILL.md Phase 3.3 specifies: each file is self-contained with <!DOCTYPE html>, :root CSS custom properties, component styles using only var(--token-name), opens standalone in browser — no build step.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: /design-generate creates .design-system/pages/{name}.html and .svg
criteria.notes: SKILL.md Phase 3.4 saves HTML to .design-system/pages/{name}.html and SVG to .design-system/pages/{name}.svg.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: HTML uses tokens from DS (no hardcoded colors/sizes)
criteria.notes: design-generate Phase 3.2 uses preview-template.html with CSS custom properties. Final Check verifies 'no hardcoded color/spacing values'. design-system-init Phase 4 step 2 checks for hardcoded hex/px.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Contrast ratio text >= 4.5:1
criteria.notes: design-system-init Phase 4 step 3 checks 3 text/background pairs against 4.5:1 target and auto-adjusts if any fails.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Agent requests screenshot on bad rendering and iterates
criteria.notes: design-generate Phase 4.1 step 3: 'Send a screenshot if you'd like adjustments'. Phase 4.2: iterates on user feedback (text or screenshot).

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Context exhaustion handling — stops and generates continuation prompt
criteria.notes: design-generate Phase 4.3: saves current state, generates continuation prompt with all context needed, tells user to start new session.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Shared references contain color-theory (→ color-psychology + color-principles), composition (→ grid-techniques), font-pairing with concrete rules
criteria.notes: Per Decision 7 mapping: color-psychology.md (18396B) + color-principles.md (13416B) replace color-theory.md. grid-techniques.md (10666B) in design-generate/references/ replaces composition.md. font-pairing.md (7786B) in design-system-init/references/. All contain substantive actionable rules per code audit.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Design-review in do-task gives concrete token-based recommendations
criteria.notes: design-review SKILL.md How to Report section specifies format: 'found {what} in {file}:{line} -> use {token CSS variable}'. Examples: 'found color #3B82F6 in Button.tsx:14 -> use --color-primary-500'. Cap at 3, prioritized by impact.

criteria.description: User-spec AC: Retrospective creates lessons in lessons-learned.md, promotes 3+ to design-principles.md, generates next-session prompt
criteria.notes: design-retrospective Phase 3: writes lessons to .design-system/lessons-learned.md (Problem/Cause/Solution/Rule format). Phase 4: counts occurrences, promotes 3+ times rules to .design-system/design-principles.md. Phase 5: generates self-contained next-session prompt.

criteria.description: No regression in existing do-task flow (design-review is additive, skips silently when no DS)
criteria.notes: do-task hook (item 4 in Step 2) has two guard conditions. Decision framework in design-review: 3 of 4 cells result in 'Skip silently'. No error, no message when conditions not met. Existing steps 1-3 and 5 unchanged.

audit_summary.code_audit: PASS. 17 files reviewed. 0 critical, 0 major, 4 minor findings (library-catalog.md unreferenced from skills, design-retrospective has no shared reference links, minor clarity issue in design-generate Phase 3.2, cosmetic CSP note). All structural checks pass: <500 lines, correct frontmatter, valid reference links, no emphasis words, no duplication, correct integration placement.
audit_summary.security_audit: PASS (APPROVED). 0 critical, 0 high, 1 medium (style-src 'unsafe-inline' — accepted trade-off for local previews), 4 low (theoretical only). Decision 8 (CSP script-src 'none') and Decision 9 (path validation /^[a-z0-9-]+$/) correctly implemented. No hardcoded secrets, no unsafe commands, no prompt injection vectors.
audit_summary.test_audit: ADEQUATE with recommendations. 22 scenario tests across 4 skills. 0 critical, 2 major gaps (missing .design-system/ scenario for retrospective, untested contrast auto-fix), 5 minor gaps (path traversal test, review prioritization cap, cross-skill interaction, promotion boundary, SCSS extraction). Recommendation: add 7 scenarios (22 → 29). For L-size markdown-only feature, scenario testing is the appropriate and sufficient primary method.
